<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261622041 space=VN version=5 -->
## PAGE 00003: (19.0 SP4) Cameo DataHub

- page_id: `261622041`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261622041/19.0+SP4+Cameo+DataHub
- version_number: 5
- version_date: `2025-10-10T17:14:02.291+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: ['news-feature']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

top

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

Cameo DataHub 19.0 SP4 is significantly improved with bug fixes specifically implemented into the following areas. Get it today on [nomagic.com](http://www.nomagic.com/) or contact your sales representative, and don't forget to give us your feedback on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc) or [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/nminc.co). Also, please check the latest and additional .

##### Bug Fixes

- Synchronization is no longer applied with non-selected stereotypes that the data are copied twice to properties inherited from the parent stereotype containing the same property name.
- DataHub database no longer detects inconsequent changes after updating server projects.
- When synchronizing and mapping new nodes with the excluded type for TeamCenter integration, synchronized nodes are now marked as excluded without aborting the synchronization process.
- Excluded DHLinks are no longer deleted after updating Teamwork Cloud/server projects.

#### INFO: Information

Information

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10082&resolution=7&fixfor=11490&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in Cameo DataHub 19.0 SP4.

**Note**: You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for[www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

##### Documentation

- Cameo DataHub 19.0 SP4

## PAGE 00004: (19.0 SP4) Cameo Safety and Reliability Analyzer

- page_id: `261622029`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261622029/19.0+SP4+Cameo+Safety+and+Reliability+Analyzer
- version_number: 2
- version_date: `2025-10-09T13:29:20.221+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

##### New Generic Safety Table for the ISO 26262 Functional Safety Plugin

The ISO 26262 Functional Safety Plugin has been improved by adding a new Generic Safety Table. This table allows you to display custom elements and their properties depending on the selected scope. Itwill come in handy when you need to seeall relevant elementsextending the ISO 26262 library (e.g., Typical Automotive Situation, Accident Scenario, Hazardous Event, and Automotive Effect) in one place.The figure below illustrates how to use a Generic Safety table to display *Crash Automotive Situation* elements derived from an Operational Situation.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### An example of a Generic Safety Table created for a custom Operational Situation.

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Generic Safety Table' space='CSRA190SP4']>]]>

##### Documentation

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Safety and Reliability Analyzer' space='CSRA190SP4']

This table allows you to display custom elements and their properties depending on the selected scope. ## PAGE 00005: (19.0 SP4) Concept Modeler Plugin

- page_id: `261622039`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261622039/19.0+SP4+Concept+Modeler+Plugin
- version_number: 3
- version_date: `2025-10-09T13:55:56.048+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

##### Bug Fixes

- <<Equivalent Class>> generalizations are not included in a generalization tree during an auto layout.
- Freezing IRIs no longer shows IRI tagged values on some diagrams.
- Switching or opening projects no longer causes "Session not created" errors or the disappearance of the containment tree.

You can check[the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10280&resolution=7&fixfor=11489&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC)of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in Cameo Concept Modeler Plugin 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:**You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for[www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Concept Modeler Documentation' space='CCM190SP4']

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261622113 space=VN version=5 -->
## PAGE 00006: (19.0 SP4) Magic Alf Analyst / Alf Plugin

- page_id: `261622113`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261622113/19.0+SP4+Magic+Alf+Analyst+Alf+Plugin
- version_number: 5
- version_date: `2025-10-09T13:39:30.137+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: ['unrestored-unknown-attachment']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### top

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

The Alf Plugin version 19.0 SP4 provides combined syntax error and constraint violation highlighting in the Alf Editor.

##### errorsHighlighting Syntax Errors and Constraint Violations Together in the Alf Editor

Previously, the Alf Editor only ran constraint checks if there were no syntax errors in the text being edited. Now the Editor attempts to run constraint checks even when there are syntax errors, so syntax errors and constraint violations can be highlighted together.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Alf code with both syntax errors and constraint violations highlighted.

[Learn more about the Alf Editor >>](https://docs.nomagic.com/display/ALFP190SP4/The+Alf+editor)

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10082&resolution=7&fixfor=11490&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in Alf Plugin 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:** You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for [www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Magic Alf Analyst Documentation' space='MAF190SP4']
- Alf Plugin 19.0 SP4

##### Other resources

- Modeling Community Blogs
- Modeling Community Forum
- Webinars
- FAQ

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261622000 space=VN version=5 -->
## PAGE 00007: (19.0 SP4) Magic Collaboration Studio / Teamwork Cloud and Services

- page_id: `261622000`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261622000/19.0+SP4+Magic+Collaboration+Studio+Teamwork+Cloud+and+Services
- version_number: 5
- version_date: `2025-10-10T17:14:52.504+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

##### Key Issues Fixed in this Service Pack

The following issues have been fixed with this version:

- The SAML integration with metadata URL did not work with IdP under a secure connection.
- The internal server error used to appear in certain cases when querying the decomposition of the UML model via REST API.
- The possible unsuccessful import of LDAP user groups was resolved by providing a separate user group class configuration.
- The number of open files issue was fixed in the TWCloud service script.
- The default eobject-id-for-revision.cache-size parameter in the TWCloud configuration file was lowered to 30 in order to prevent the out of memory exceptions when under a higher load.
- The duplicate active users exception no longer appears upon the "Administrator" user removal via Data Manager.

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Magic Collaboration Studio Documentation' space='MCS190SP4']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Teamwork Cloud Documentation' space='TWCloud190SP4']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

top

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

The new release presents significant Licensing, Installation, and Other Changes. What is more, it brings improvements to the Project Statistics tool.

As for Collaborative modeling, users can now handle conflicts by Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge. Additionally, major Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge have been made.

Last but not least, a number of key issues detected in earlier versions, including those affecting modeling tool performance, has been fixed.

Download Cameo System Modeler today at[nomagic.com](http://www.nomagic.com/), or contact your sales representative. And please don't forget to give us your feedback on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/3736574), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc) or [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/magicdraw/). Also, please check the and additional .

#### Modeling and Infrastructure

##### Licensing, Installation, and Other Changes

The 19.0 SP4 release introduces important changes that affect licensing, installation, and other services you use directly from the modeling tool.

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Licensing and other changes in 19.0 SP4' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Project Statistics

You can now contribute to improving the performance of the modeling tool and modeling experience. All you need to do is to export the Project Statistics report that is based on the quantitative data collected from your project and then share it with us.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Exporting project statistics

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Project Statistics' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

#### CollaCollaboration

##### Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge

Handle Merge conflicts more efficiently by tailoring the Merge behavior to your needs! From now on, in the **Environment** options dialog, you can specify either the Source or Target to be the default resolution when dealing with conflicting changes.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Automatically choosing Source as the default resolution during merge

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Starting Model Merge' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge

The latest release brings significant improvements to the Project Merge memory consumption. Specifically, with multiple optimizations in place, we reduced the memory footprint by 25%-40%, as compared to version 19.0 SP3. The effect may vary from model to model and depend on its size as well as the number and type of changes themselves.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Comparing memory consumption between different versions

#### other_2Other Features

##### Report Wizard

- Bookmark functions for creating Microsoft Word references and hyperlinks are now available. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Bookmark tool' space='MD190SP4']>]]>
- You can sort elements that correspond to the Containment tree order. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Sorter tool' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Key Issues Fixed

The following key issues have been fixed with this version:

- No error occurs when uploading generated report files to the server through FTP and SSL in Report Wizard.
- The problem of the Dependency Matrix template displaying incomplete allocated dependencies in Report Wizard has now been solved.
- TWC projects that automatically used a system/standard profile and, at the same time, were used by a non-system/standard usage could no be exported into .mdzip.
- The Excel Import plugin could not be installed since it was not compatible with the 19.0 SP4 version of the modeling tool.
- The direction of Item Flow could not be changed.
- The exception was thrown in a .log file when obtaining element names from the elements that did not have names.
- The validation of diagrams was time-consuming in larger projects.
- The Transformation Wizard performance problems.
- A new nested Instance was created instead of being reused during the data import from Excel.
- Dialog overlapping occurred when several dialogs were opened on MAC.

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10031&resolution=7&fixfor=11487&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in Cameo Systems Modeler 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:** You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for [www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

#### Documetnation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Magic Cyber Systems Engineer Documentation' space='MCSE190SP4']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Systems Modeler Documentation' space='CSM190SP4']

## PAGE 00009: (19.0 SP4) Magic Model Analyst / Cameo Simulation Toolkit

- page_id: `261622088`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261622088/19.0+SP4+Magic+Model+Analyst+Cameo+Simulation+Toolkit
- version_number: 4
- version_date: `2025-10-10T17:13:14.034+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

Version 19.0 SP4 of the simulation plugin has encompassed a number of key improvements to enhance its usage, and please don't forget to give us your feedback on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/3736574), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc) or [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/magicdraw/).

##### Key issues fixed

- When «Create» stereotype applies to an operation, nested composite structure can now be returned with instances created for both of its Parts and a link between them.
- The value is now successfully propagated according to the direction of the Flow property after the source value is updated.
- MagicDraw no longer freezes when using composite States.
- When Monte Carlo simulation is run with treatAllClassifiersAsActive set true, the parametric result is correct without exceptions anymore.
- Regardless of whether the «Create» stereotype is applied or not, methods are now called as usual.
- The active object Activity continues running as normal when the Terminate Nested Behaviors option is false, regardless of whether creating Activity simulation is completed or not.
- Junctions and Choices are no longer duplicated executions in the State Machine diagram when they are paused at breakpoints.
- Animation now correctly shows propagated Send Signal Actions via Flow Ports.

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10172&resolution=7&fixfor=11491&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in Cameo Simulation Toolkit 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:** You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for [www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Magic Model Analyst Documentation' space='MSI190SP4']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Simulation Toolkit Documentation' space='CST190SP4']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

top

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

The new release presents significant **Licensing, Installation, and Other Changes**. Additionally, it adds improvements to the **Project Statistics** tool.

Users can now handle conflicts by **Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge** in Collaborative modeling, and major **Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge** have been made.

Last but not least, a number of key issues detected in earlier versions, including those affecting modeling tool performance, have been fixed.

Download the newest MagicDraw version at [nomagic.com](http://nomagic.com) or contact your sales representative. Don't forget to give us your feedback on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/3736574), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc), or [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/magicdraw/). For further information, please check the latest and additional [resources](http://docs.nomagic.com/#resources).

#### miModeling and Infrastructure

##### Licensing, Installation, and Other Changes

The 19.0 SP4 release introduces important changes that affect licensing, installation, and other services you use directly from the modeling tool.

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Licensing and other changes in 19.0 SP4' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Project Statistics

You can now contribute to improving the performance of the modeling tool and modeling experience. Simply export the Project Statistics report that is based on the quantitative data collected from your project and then share it with us.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Exporting project statistics

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Project Statistics' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

#### CollaCollaboration

##### Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge

Handle Merge conflicts more efficiently by tailoring the Merge behavior to your needs! From now on, in the **Environment** options dialog, you can specify either the Source or Target to be the default resolution when dealing with conflicting changes.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Automatically choosing Source as the default resolution during merge

>]]>

##### Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge

The latest release brings significant improvements to the Project Merge memory consumption. Specifically, with multiple optimizations in place, we reduced the memory footprint by 25%-40%, compared to version 19.0 SP3. The effect may vary from model to model, depending on the model's size, as well as the number and type of changes themselves.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Comparing memory consumption between different versions

#### other_2Other Features

##### Report Wizard

- Bookmark functions for creating Microsoft Word references and hyperlinks are now available. Learn more about Bookmark tool >>
- You can sort elements that correspond to the Containment tree order. Learn more how to use this sorter tool >>

##### Key Issues Fixed

The following key issues have been fixed with this version:

- No error occurs when uploading generated report files to the server through FTP and SSL in Report Wizard.
- The problem of the Dependency Matrix template displaying incomplete allocated dependencies in Report Wizard has now been solved.
- TWC projects that automatically used a system/standard profile while being used by a non-system/standard usage can now be exported into .mdzip.
- The direction of Item Flow can now be changed.
- Diagram validation is now faster in larger projects.
- The Transformation Wizard performance problems have been fixed.
- A new nested Instance is no longer created instead of being reused during the data import from Excel.
- Dialog overlapping no longer occurs when several dialogs are opened on MAC.

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10021&resolution=7&fixfor=11502&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in MagicDraw 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:** You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for [www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

Simply export the Project Statistics report that is based on the quantitative data collected from your project and then share it with us. </p><p><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="project_statistics_dialog.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Exporting project statistics</h6><p><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MD190SP4" ri:content-title="Project Statistics" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more about Project Statistics >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><h2><ac:structured-macro ac:name="anchor" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="cdc64440-0423-40db-a24f-5a98168bd09f"><ac:parameter ac:name="">Colla</ac:parameter></ac:structured-macro>Collaboration</h2><h3>Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge</h3><p>Handle Merge conflicts more efficiently by tailoring the Merge behavior to your needs! From now on, in the <strong>Environment</strong> options dialog, you can specify either the Source or Target to be the default resolution when dealing with conflicting changes.</p><p><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="automatically_accepting_changes_from_source_version_news.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Automatically choosing Source as the default resolution during merge</h6><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MD190SP4" ri:content-title="Starting Model Merge" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more about resolving conflicting changes automatically >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><br /><h3>Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge</h3><p>The latest release brings significant improvements to the Project Merge memory consumption. Specifically, with multiple optimizations in place, we reduced the memory footprint by 25%-40%, compared to version 19.0 SP3. The effect may vary from model to model, depending on the model's size, as well as the number and type of changes themselves. </p><p><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Merge memory consumption.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">Comparing memory consumption between different versions</h6><h2><ac:structured-macro ac:name="anchor" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="74cc6fe7-fd0c-4ce1-a388-af5f40a7c3d3"><ac:parameter ac:name="">other_2</ac:parameter></ac:structured-macro>Other Features</h2><h3>Report Wizard</h3><ul><li data-uuid="83947df0-e2b9-438f-bcdf-94337b8ff729">Bookmark functions for creating Microsoft Word references and hyperlinks are now available. <a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/MD190SP4/Bookmark+tool">Learn more about Bookmark tool &gt;&gt;</a></li><li data-uuid="73a5302d-1d0e-4c66-9a94-ed161c92c18f">You can sort elements that correspond to the Containment tree order. <a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/MD190SP4/Sorter+tool">Learn more how to use this sorter tool &gt;&gt;</a></li></ul><h3>Key Issues Fixed</h3><p>The following key issues have been fixed with this version:</p><ul><li data-uuid="1356d5d9-2801-44e1-8f1e-acf1d7e4f991">No error occurs when uploading generated report files to the server through FTP and SSL in Report Wizard.</li><li data-uuid="240e448c-7db3-4e55-9efe-1ae298f2dc5b">The problem of the Dependency Matrix template displaying incomplete allocated dependencies in Report Wizard has now been solved.</li><li data-uuid="9d9457ba-ac52-4d3c-ae49-afcfd99a7b85">TWC projects that automatically used a system/standard profile while being used by a non-system/standard usage can now be exported into .mdzip.</li><li data-uuid="d114ded2-c9e2-4982-a4b2-c8a392a28c6b">The direction of Item Flow can now be changed.</li><li data-uuid="b67f5746-c837-4fba-af7d-20a9d3c224c6">Diagram validation is now faster in larger projects.</li><li data-uuid="5e56b9f4-109d-4a71-8bcc-2ed6d5acf2d3">The Transformation Wizard performance problems have been fixed.</li><li data-uuid="d00f3eec-163d-4b4c-979b-adf8803b6f13">A new nested Instance is no longer created instead of being reused during the data import from Excel. </li><li data-uuid="c858f62c-a984-4daa-864b-9fb91f3da487">Dialog overlapping no longer occurs when several dialogs are opened on MAC.</li></ul><p><br /></p><ac:structured-macro ac:name="info" ac:schema-version="1" ac:macro-id="5995f486-71ef-4847-9ef2-71545df1f999"><ac:rich-text-body><p><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#000000);">You can check <a href="https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&amp;&amp;pid=10021&amp;resolution=7&amp;fixfor=11502&amp;sorter/field=issuekey&amp;sorter/order=DESC&amp;sorter/field=priority&amp;sorter/order=DESC">the list</a> of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in MagicDraw 19.0 SP4. <br /><strong>Note:</strong> You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for <a href="https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&amp;cmd_show_login=1&amp;show_confirm=1&amp;menu=login">www.nomagic.com</a>.<br /></span></p></ac:rich-text-body></ac:structured-macro><h2>Documentation</h2><ul><li data-uuid="273ca224-b3a9-4ccb-b2d4-e8e87adf495b"><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MSA190SP4" ri:content-title="Magic Software Architect Documentation" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Magic Software Architect 19.0 SP4]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li><li data-uuid="88409fc4-18fc-452f-a8ac-aef837880c2c"><ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="MD190SP4" ri:content-title="MagicDraw Documentation" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[MagicDraw 19.0 SP4]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></li></ul></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261621918 space=VN version=5 -->
## PAGE 00011: (19.0 SP4) Magic Systems of Systems Architect / Cameo Enterprise Architecture

- page_id: `261621918`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261621918/19.0+SP4+Magic+Systems+of+Systems+Architect+Cameo+Enterprise+Architecture
- version_number: 5
- version_date: `2025-11-27T16:49:31.904+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (19.0 SP4) 19.0 SP4 Version News
- labels: ['unrestored-unknown-attachment']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

top

###### Released on: June 29, 2020

The new release presents significant**Licensing, Installation, and Other Changes**. What is more, it brings improvements to the**Project Statistics**tool.

As for Collaborative modeling, users can now handle conflicts by **Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge**. Additionally, major **Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge** have been made.

Last but not least, a number of key issues detected in earlier versions, including those affecting modeling tool performance, has been fixed.

Download it today at[nomagic.com](http://www.nomagic.com/)or contact your sales representative, and don't forget to give us your feedback on[Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc)or[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/magicdraw/).

#### miModeling and Infrastructure

##### Licensing, Installation, and Other Changes

The 19.0 SP4 release introduces important changes that affect licensing, installation, and other services you use directly from the modeling tool.

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Licensing and other changes in 19.0 SP4' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Project Statistics

You can now contribute to improving the performance of the modeling tool and modeling experience. All you need to do is to export the Project Statistics report that is based on the quantitative data collected from your project and then share it with us.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Exporting project statistics

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Project Statistics' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

#### CollaCollaboration

##### Resolving Conflicting Changes Automatically in Merge

Handle Merge conflicts more efficiently by tailoring the Merge behavior to your needs! From now on, in the **Environment** options dialog, you can specify either the Source or Target to be the default resolution when dealing with conflicting changes.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Automatically choosing Source as the default resolution during merge

[CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Starting Model Merge' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Memory Consumption Improvements in Merge

The latest release brings significant improvements to the Project Merge memory consumption. Specifically, with multiple optimizations in place, we reduced the memory footprint by 25%-40%, as compared to version 19.0 SP3. The effect may vary from model to model and depend on its size as well as the number and type of changes themselves.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Comparing memory consumption between different versions

#### other_2Other Features

##### Report Wizard

- Bookmark functions for creating Microsoft Word references and hyperlinks are now available. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Bookmark tool' space='MD190SP4']>]]>
- You can sort elements that correspond to the Containment tree order. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Sorter tool' space='MD190SP4']>]]>

##### Key Issues Fixed

The following key issues have been fixed with this version:

- No error occurs when uploading generated report files to the server through FTP and SSL in Report Wizard.
- The problem of the Dependency Matrix template displaying incomplete allocated dependencies in Report Wizard has now been solved.
- TWC projects that automatically used a system/standard profile and, at the same time, were used by a non-system/standard usage could no be exported into .mdzip.
- The Excel Import plugin could not be installed since it was not compatible with the 19.0 SP4 version of the modeling tool.
- The direction of Item Flow could not be changed.
- The exception was thrown in a .log file when obtaining element names from the elements that did not have names.
- The validation of diagrams was time-consuming in larger projects.
- The Transformation Wizard performance problems.
- A new nested Instance was created instead of being reused during the data import from Excel.
- Dialog overlapping occurred when several dialogs were opened on MAC.

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10171&resolution=7&fixfor=11483&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in Cameo Enterprise Architecture 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:** You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for [www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

#### resourcesDocumentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Magic Systems of Systems Architect Documentation' space='MSOSA190SP4']
- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Enterprise Architecture Documentation' space='CEA190SP4']

This version was released for compatibility purposes only. It does not contain new capabilities.

Download it today at [nomagic.com](http://www.nomagic.com/) or contact your sales representative, and don't forget to give us your feedback on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc) or [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/magicdraw/).

You can check [the list](https://support.nomagic.com/secure/IssueNavigator.jspa?reset=true&&pid=10171&resolution=7&fixfor=11483&sorter/field=issuekey&sorter/order=DESC&sorter/field=priority&sorter/order=DESC) of publicly available issues or your own reported issues fixed in UAF Plugin 19.0 SP4. 
**Note:** You will be required to login. Use the same username and password as for [www.nomagic.com](https://www.magicdraw.com/main.php?ts=login&cmd_show_login=1&show_confirm=1&menu=login).

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261623004 space=VN version=3 -->
## PAGE 00016: (2021x Refresh1) 2021x Refresh1 Version News

- page_id: `261623004`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261623004/2021x+Refresh1+2021x+Refresh1+Version+News
- version_number: 3
- version_date: `2025-11-27T16:47:40.904+01:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 4, 2021

#### TIP: Welcome to the version news site for CATIA Magic / No Magic products!

Welcome to the version news site for CATIA Magic / No Magic products!

Get started by selecting a product below and its version in the site header.

##### Hot Fixes for version 2021x Refresh1

- 2021x Refresh1 Hot Fix 3 Due to the Spring Framework (Spring4Shell)vulnerability issues, the 2021x Refresh1 HF3 has been released on June 3, 2022. The HF3 addresses the Spring Framework (Spring4Shell) 5.3.0 to 5.3.17, 5.2.0 to 5.2.19 versions. For more information, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='CATIA Magic and No Magic products affected by Spring Framework - Spring4Shell - vulnerability - CVE-2022-22965' space='FAQ'].
- 2021x Refresh1 Hot Fix 2 Due to the Apache Log4j vulnerability issues, the 2021x Refresh1 HF2 has been released on March 4, 2022. The HF2 addresses Log4j 1.x and 2.x versions. For more information, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='CATIA Magic and No Magic products affected by Log4j vulnerability - CVE-2021-44228, CVE-2021-45046, CVE-2021-44832' space='FAQ']. Also, see the Knowledge Base article at [https://kb.dsxclient.3ds.com/mashup-ui/page/resultqai?id=QA00000102301e](https://kb.dsxclient.3ds.com/mashup-ui/page/resultqai?id=QA00000102301e).
- 2021x Refresh1 Hot Fix 1 Due to the Apache Log4j vulnerability issues, the 2021x Refresh1 HF1 has been released on December 22, 2021. The HF1 addresses Log4j 2.x versions. For more information, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='CATIA Magic and No Magic products affected by Log4j vulnerability - CVE-2021-44228, CVE-2021-45046, CVE-2021-44832' space='FAQ']. Also, see the Knowledge Base article at [https://kb.dsxclient.3ds.com/mashup-ui/page/resultqai?id=QA00000102301e](https://kb.dsxclient.3ds.com/mashup-ui/page/resultqai?id=QA00000102301e).

#### WARNING: Hot Fix version compatibility

Hot Fix version compatibility

The version and Hot Fix number of a modeling tool and its plugins must be the same. After installing the Hot Fix version of a modeling tool, select the same Hot Fix version when [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Downloading installation files' space='NMDOC']. The modeling tool will not work correctly if you install plugins of a different version and/or Hot Fix number.

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261623281 space=VN version=2 -->
## PAGE 00017: (2021x Refresh1) Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud

- page_id: `261623281`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261623281/2021x+Refresh1+Cameo+Collaborator+for+Teamwork+Cloud
- version_number: 2
- version_date: `2025-10-10T17:35:37.200+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2021x Refresh1) 2021x Refresh1 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 4, 2021

Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud 2021x Refresh1 introduces the commit of multiple changes, which significantly reduces the number of commits when editing models, the possibility to add hyperlinks to model elements, and further improvements to model editing functionality.

#### NOTE: 2021x Refresh1 Hot Fix available

2021x Refresh1 Hot Fix available

Due to the Apache Log4j vulnerability issues, the 2021x Refresh1 HF1 has been released on December 22, 2021.

For more information, see [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='CATIA Magic and No Magic products affected by Log4j vulnerability - CVE-2021-44228, CVE-2021-45046, CVE-2021-44832' space='FAQ'].

Also, see the Knowledge Base article at [https://kb.dsxclient.3ds.com/mashup-ui/page/resultqai?id=QA00000102301e](https://kb.dsxclient.3ds.com/mashup-ui/page/resultqai?id=QA00000102301e).

##### Commit of Multiple Changes

This version of Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud brings a major improvement allowing you to commit changes accumulated while editing a model in one go. This significantly reduces the number of commits and therefore decreases the database growth when editing models.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Committing model changes to Teamwork Cloud.

##### Adding Hyperlinks to Model Elements

Now Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud supports cross-references to model elements in all string-type values. You can represent links as element names, representation text, or any custom text. In addition, you can choose whether links are updated when element names change.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Adding links to model elements in string-type values.

##### New Model Editing Capabilities

We are constantly improving and expanding the model editing in Cameo Collaborator functionality, so this version of the product brings several new features as well. Now you can:

- Create and edit slot values for Instance Specifications.
- Edit bullet lists created by using document templates.

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### Creating a new value for an Instance Specification.

##### Other

- Now you can organize Cameo Collaborator documents in a flexible folder-like manner using nested categories. The hierarchical grouping of categories will help you keep the repository tidy and find your documents easier. [ATTACHMENT filename='nested_categories.png']
- The navigation and comment panes in Cameo Collaborator documents are now resizable.
- From this version of Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud user interface depends on user permissions. For example, the commenting or editing button will be shown in a document only if you have the permissions to comment or edit the document.

##### Key Issues Fixed

- Metric Tables in Cameo Collaborator documents are no longer editable.
- Now heading numbering is not displayed in Cameo Collaborator documents exported to PDF or HTML when the selected scope is Active section or Active section's presentation elements .

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Collaborator for Teamwork Cloud Documentation' space='CC4TWC2021xR1']

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261623311 space=VN version=2 -->
## PAGE 00018: (2021x Refresh1) Cameo DataHub

- page_id: `261623311`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261623311/2021x+Refresh1+Cameo+DataHub
- version_number: 2
- version_date: `2025-10-10T17:24:55.429+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2021x Refresh1) 2021x Refresh1 Version News
- labels: ['news-feature']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

top

###### Released on: June 4, 2021

Cameo DataHub 2021x Refresh1 introduces the following new features and improvements:

- a more refined authentication technique to connect to DOORS Next Generation
- Traceable Requirement Management supported to be deployed on both Premises and Cloud
- an additional option to ignore DXL attributes when synchronizing with DOORS
- other performance improvements

To download the latest MagicDraw version, see[Downloading installation files](https://docs.nomagic.com/display/IL2022xR2/Downloading+installation+files). Don't forget to give us your feedback on[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/groups/3736574),[Twitter](https://twitter.com/nm_inc), or[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/magicdraw/). For further information,check the.

#### Integration with DOORS

##### A more refined authentication technique for connecting to DOORS Next Generation

For the secure environment with different authentications including single sign-on, the simple login form has been replaced with a login with an embedded browser. This change allows DataHub to create connections to a variety of secured servers. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Adding Data Sources for IBM Rational DOORS Next Generation' space='CDH2021xR1']>]]>

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### The Add Data Source dialog now allows connecting to the DOORS NG embedded browser by selecting Login with browser.

##### An extra option to ignore DXL attributes when synchronizing with DOORS

DOORS can have custom attributes whose value is populated from the DXL script. Because retrieving the scripted attributes may degrade synchronization performance, this option has been specially developed to effectively assist you in ignoring those DXL attributes. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='IBM Rational DOORS' space='CDH2021xR1']>]]>

##### Performance improvements

- Significant improvement of the DataHub performance of synchronization to the DOORS module containing a number of custom attributes.
- Improved performance when opening the DOORS Next Generation module.
- Less time to complete the Check Changes DataHub action.

#### Integration with ENOVIA Traceable Requirement Management

DataHub enhances the Traceable Requirement Management (TRM) connection by applying the login with an embedded browser in place of the simple login form. Moreover, the new authentication technique allows connecting to both TRMs that are deployed on Premises and Cloud. [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Adding Data Sources for ENOVIA TRM' space='CDH2021xR1']>]]>

[IMAGE alt='' src='']

###### The Add Data Source dialog enables the connection to TRM by entering the 3DEXPERIENCE address for the login.

[Learn more about authenticating with 3DEXPERIENCE platform >>](https://docs.nomagic.com/display/MD2021xR1/Authentication+with+3DEXPERIENCE+platform)

#### Key issues fixed

- The issue of connecting to DOORS Next Generation containing archived components has been fixed.
- The issue of synchronizing links to DOORS when the target module is read-only has been solved.

#### Documetnation

- Cameo DataHub 2021x Refresh1

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE

For further information, </span>check the<span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);"> </span><ac:link><ri:space ri:space-key="CDH2021xR1" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[product documentation]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link><span style="color:var(--ds-text,#333333);">.</span></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><p><br /></p></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section><ac:layout-section ac:type="single"><ac:layout-cell><h2>Integration with DOORS</h2><h3>A more refined authentication technique for connecting to DOORS Next Generation</h3><p>For the secure environment with different authentications including single sign-on, the simple login form has been replaced with a login with an embedded browser. This change allows DataHub to create connections to a variety of secured servers. <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="CDH2021xR1" ri:content-title="Adding Data Sources for IBM Rational DOORS Next Generation" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn how to add Data Sources for IBM Rational DOORS Next Generation >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><p><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Add Data Source Dialog - DOORS NG.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">The Add Data Source dialog now allows connecting to the DOORS NG embedded browser by selecting Login with browser.</h6><h3>An extra option to ignore DXL attributes when synchronizing with DOORS</h3><p>DOORS can have custom attributes whose value is populated from the DXL script. Because retrieving the scripted attributes may degrade synchronization performance, this option has been specially developed to effectively assist you in ignoring those DXL attributes. <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="CDH2021xR1" ri:content-title="IBM Rational DOORS" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Further details of IBM Rational DOORS options >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><h3>Performance improvements</h3><ul><li data-uuid="dc531213-11e1-41a1-8ae4-cdaa97c69c6d">Significant improvement of the DataHub performance of synchronization to the DOORS module containing a number of custom attributes.</li><li data-uuid="5e9909a6-d98c-4b7c-bd9c-519bdb62d5cf">Improved performance when opening the DOORS Next Generation module.</li><li data-uuid="3e3d8fde-0373-4d3e-a099-c45cad8abc39">Less time to complete the <strong>Check Changes</strong> DataHub action.</li></ul><h2>Integration with ENOVIA Traceable Requirement Management</h2><p>DataHub enhances the Traceable Requirement Management (TRM) connection by applying the login with an embedded browser in place of the simple login form. Moreover, the new authentication technique allows connecting to both TRMs that are deployed on Premises and Cloud. <ac:link><ri:page ri:space-key="CDH2021xR1" ri:content-title="Adding Data Sources for ENOVIA TRM" /><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Learn more about adding Data Sources for ENOVIA TRM >>]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><p><ac:image ac:align="center"><ri:attachment ri:filename="Add Data Source Dialog - TRM.png" /></ac:image></p><h6 style="text-align: center;">The Add Data Source dialog enables the connection to TRM by entering the 3DEXPERIENCE address for the login.</h6><p><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/MD2021xR1/Authentication+with+3DEXPERIENCE+platform">Learn more about authenticating with 3DEXPERIENCE platform &gt;&gt;</a></p><h2>Key issues fixed</h2><ul><li data-uuid="c5c103e7-72be-4218-8c08-3a22dc9db348">The issue of connecting to DOORS Next Generation containing archived components has been fixed.</li><li data-uuid="7cf6ad73-8fb1-4249-9aae-107caa949e7d">The issue of synchronizing links to DOORS when the target module is read-only has been solved.</li></ul><p style="text-align: right;"><ac:link ac:anchor="top"><ac:plain-text-link-body><![CDATA[Back to top]]></ac:plain-text-link-body></ac:link></p><h2 style="text-align: left;">Documetnation</h2><ul><li data-uuid="26fe5b89-b136-4728-a37c-ef8b15c1c275"><a href="https://docs.nomagic.com/display/CDH2021xR1/Cameo+DataHub+Documentation">Cameo DataHub 2021x Refresh1</a></li></ul></ac:layout-cell></ac:layout-section></ac:layout>

<!--NOMAGIC_PAGE id=261623309 space=VN version=1 -->
## PAGE 00020: (2021x Refresh1) Concept Modeler Plugin

- page_id: `261623309`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261623309/2021x+Refresh1+Concept+Modeler+Plugin
- version_number: 1
- version_date: `2025-10-10T11:58:59.735+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2021x Refresh1) 2021x Refresh1 Version News
- labels: []

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### Released on: June 4, 2021

##### New capabilities

- Right-clicking on a package or multiple classes now offers a menu item to create any missing defining diagrams.
- Right-clicking on a package or multiple classes now offers a menu item to refresh related elements missing from defining diagrams.

##### Usability improvements

- The subproperties tree option for "Hide Simple Properties" is now renamed to "Hide properties directly between top and bottom".
- An active validation now detects a property that subsets or redefines an unnamed property.
- An active validation now detects an invalid property chain.
- An active validation now detects a concept model with a URI inconsistent with the "URI construction strategy" project option.

##### Performance improvements (project with 10m elements)

- Creating a «Concept Model» package using the "Create Concept Model" menu item from the containment tree (from 10min to 4s).
- Drawing an «Anything» stereotyped class on the diagram from the diagram palette (from 5min to 4s).
- Drawing a «Union» stereotyped class on the diagram from the diagram palette (from 5min to 4s).
- Drawing an «Equivalent Class» generalization on the diagram from the diagram palette (from 5min to 3s).
- Creating a subproperty chain by dragging and dropping a property on the diagram (from 6min to 2s).
- Creating a property restriction by dragging and dropping a property on the diagram (from 5min to 2s).
- Adding the «Necessary & Sufficient» stereotype to a property using the "Add property constraints to the conditions sufficient to classify an instance" context menu item (from 5min to 1s).
- Adding the «Self» stereotype to a property using the "Require each individual to have a property relationship with itself" context menu item (from 4min to 1s).

##### Natural Language Glossary improvements

- A Natural Language Glossary report now provides a way to get a hyperlink to an entry by right-clicking on the entry name.

##### Bug fixes

- «Restriction» stereotype is now initially hidden when applying it to a stereotyped property.
- Anonymous classes belonging to a foreign namespace are no longer ignored during export.
- A literal annotation without a comment datatype is no longer deleted when it is reimported with an XSD String datatype.
- The subproperties tree now correctly hides properties that are directly between top and bottom.
- An annotation that uses the preferred annotation property is no longer required to be in the same concept model as the element it annotates.
- A «Restriction» stereotype is no longer applied to an «Annotation Property» during project migration.
- An «Annotation Property» no longer shows the context menu item to convert the property to a restriction.
- Importing an object property that belongs to a foreign namespace and has no domain definition no longer fails.
- Importing OWL now correctly handles annotations that use the preferred annotation property.
- Importing more than one annotation on the same element that uses the preferred annotation property no longer results in CCM ignoring all but one of the annotations.
- Importing an individual typed by an anonymous class no longer results in an import failure.
- Creating a «Complement Of» or «Disjoint With» dependency between unnamed classes no longer results in an error.
- Exporting a disjoint generalization set with a single generalization no longer results in an erroneous OWL disjoint axiom.
- Opening a project now offers a clearer message for applying the missing «Restriction» stereotype to restricting properties.
- Creating and editing a property restriction no longer fails when it has no type.
- Canceling out of the "Edit the restriction" dialog no longer resizes existing classes.
- A non-cryptic summary message is now shown after importing relationships between individuals.
- Datatype properties are no longer ignored in anonymous class descriptions.

##### Documentation

- [CONFLUENCE_PAGE title='Cameo Concept Modeler Documentation' space='CCMP2021xR1']

### EXACT CONFLUENCE STORAGE SOURCE


## PAGE 00021: (2021x Refresh1) Magic Alf Analyst / Alf Plugin

- page_id: `261623432`
- space_key: `VN`
- source_url: https://docs.nomagic.com/spaces/VN/pages/261623432/2021x+Refresh1+Magic+Alf+Analyst+Alf+Plugin

- version_date: `2025-10-10T11:59:03.989+02:00`
- ancestors: Versions of Version News > (2021x Refresh1) 2021x Refresh1 Version News
- labels: ['unrestored-unknown-attachment']

### NORMALIZED CONTENT

###### top

###### Released on: June 4, 2021

Alf Plugin Version 2021x Refresh1 has fixed a bug regarding the Alf Editor window buttons.

##### Key Issue Fixed

The following key issue has been fixed with Alf Plugin 2021x Refresh1:

- The Create button is now always properly enabled in the Alf Editor window to allow creating a new Alf element.

##### Documentation

- 
- Alf Plugin 2021x Refresh 1
